jsonLd.title: Dunzo is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Dunzo family as a E-commerce Executive in Lucknow. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Dunzo:
Dunzo is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dunzo!
